evals.prompt: Send a message to the dev room on Matrix saying 'Deployment complete for v2.3.0'.
evals.expected_output: Uses the matrix-send-e2ee.py script with room name and message text.
assertions: Uses uv run to execute the script
Passes room name as first argument
Passes message text as second argument
Does not use the non-E2EE matrix-send.py fallback without reason

evals.prompt: List my Matrix rooms so I can see which ones I'm joined to.
evals.expected_output: Uses the matrix-rooms.py script to list joined rooms.
assertions: Uses uv run to execute the script
Does not attempt to call Matrix API directly
Presents room names and IDs from the output

evals.prompt: Read the last 5 messages from the agent-work Matrix room.
evals.expected_output: Uses matrix-read-e2ee.py with room name and --limit flag.
assertions: Uses uv run to execute the script
Uses --limit 5 flag to restrict message count
